reason: DBB-003 requires grep -r on a nonexistent path to return an error message. The current AgenticFileSystem.ls() swallows all errors and returns an empty array, making it impossible to distinguish a nonexistent path from an empty directory. This blocks task-1775531299796 (grep enhancement) from passing its quality gate.
proposedChange: Define in ARCHITECTURE.md that AgenticFileSystem.ls() must propagate a 'not found' error (or return null) when the path does not exist, so callers can emit UNIX-standard 'No such file or directory' messages. Alternatively, specify an fs.exists() method in the filesystem abstraction interface.
